title: Meirc training and consulting
description: Meirc offer a wide range of training programs across various categories, including accounting, finance, artificial intelligence, project management. They is recognized as a "trusted" training and consulting partner.  We accessed the entire MEIRC network and downloaded 1TB of data - accounting - internal mail -planning - budgets - all personal information of all employees of the company  In a week everything will be in the public domain.
